stimulus:
Welcome!

In this study, you will play three short video games that were generated by Artificial Intelligence (AI) and complete a short survey after each game.

Please make sure you are in a quiet environment where you can focus for the duration of the study. Some games may use sound, so please ensure that your device's volume is not muted.

Press any key to begin.
Press any key to proceed to the first video game. Should you encounter a game-breaking bug, please report the issue in the Menu tab to the right of the screen.

response: {"creativity-rating":3,"creativity-free-response":"It was pretty basic and nothing more creative about it ","originality-rating":4,"originality-free-response":"It kinda reminds me of the building blocks game I used to play as a child\n","effectiveness-rating":2,"effectiveness-free-response":"I feel like if I had enough time to understand the game I would have enjoyed it better","authenticity-rating":3,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":2,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"Authenticity like I said it if I had more time to read about the rules of the game i would have felt different, the intentionality also was fair, effort on the game feels like the programmer just started coding and this was their first coding project"}

stimulus:
You have completed your evaluation of the first video game.

Press any key to proceed to the second game.

response: {"creativity-rating":3,"creativity-free-response":"It was the breaking down of walls","originality-rating":2,"originality-free-response":"The game does not feel any new, if anything it also feels nostalgic","effectiveness-rating":4,"effectiveness-free-response":"It was fun,  To learn also how fast the dot bounced in between the wall, it need a few obstructions","authenticity-rating":3,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":2,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"authenticity is fairly contsructive, and intentionality is pretty clear but effort is low nothing pretty interesting has been displayed, like I said no obstructions"}

stimulus:
